approvedLook.face: long narrow face, blue-gray eyes, short brown-and-gray beard
approvedLook.outerwear: heavy charcoal-gray shacket with structured collar and chest pockets
approvedLook.lower: blue jeans and brown work shoes

rules: Zach is never the playable character.
Keep the black cap in active game portraits and scenes.
Use the charcoal shacket rather than a suit, hoodie, or office attire.
Preserve the selected player founder as a visually separate character.
Every scene containing the player requires matching male and female variants.
